name: aiki-cli
description: Local-first AI model council for code review and idea stress-testing using Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini/Antigravity CLIs. No API keys.
author: Gaurav Palaspagar

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/providers/profiles.json','dist/providers/profiles.json')" && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('src/skills','dist/skills',{recursive:true})" && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('serve-ui','dist/serve-ui',{recursive:true})"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test
